name: MySQL / MariaDB error log
sampleLines: 2024-04-28 04:02:05 0 [Note] InnoDB: Buffer pool(s) load completed at 240428  4:02:05
2024-04-28 04:02:06 12 [ERROR] Access denied for user 'foo'@'localhost' (using password: YES)
description: Adapted from lnav src/formats/mysql_log.json (BSD-2-Clause). MariaDB keeps its error log byte-compatible with MySQL's (see MariaDB KB 'Error Log' and MySQL 8.0 'Error Log' chapter), so the same template ships under a combined name. Captures the standard MySQL 8.0 ISO timestamp + thread id + [level] + optional [subsystem] tag introduced in 8.0's structured error log.
